summary: Iteration 145: Mira AI Features Testing - All backend tests PASS (13/13). Frontend features verified working: Add All to Cart button, Quick Book form, Service icons, Product cards with Add buttons. Cart event listener correctly implemented in CartContext.js.

mira_chat_widget.product_cards: PRESENT - Products with Add buttons (Safety Nail Clipper Set ₹499, Ear Cleaning Solution ₹349)

cart_event_listener.functionality: Listens for 'addToCart' custom events and adds products to cart

cart_event_listener.implementation: CartContext.js lines 172-185 - addEventListener for 'addToCart' custom event

Quick Book form renders correctly with date, time, and notes fields
